contents.title: GameNext Research Topic
contents.description: A structured research topic entry, used to describe open questions, hypotheses, and integration points within the GameNext ecosystem.

title.description: Short human-readable title for the research topic.

domain.description: Primary technical domain this topic belongs to.

abstract.description: Concise summary of the topic and its goals.

hypothesis.description: Testable hypothesis or guiding question for this topic.

experiments.description: List of short descriptions for planned or completed experiments.

relatedContracts.description: IDs of contracts or schemas this topic pertains to, e.g. game-next-bci-geometry-binding-v1.

anchors.description: Optional list of topicIds that this topic is anchored to. Required for speculative topics.

predictedHardware.description: Optional hardware envelope and platform expectations for this topic.

minGpuFlops.description: Minimum expected GPU TFLOPS required to realize this topic’s designs.

recommendedMemoryMB.description: Recommended system or GPU memory in megabytes.

targetPlatforms.description: Target platforms this topic primarily considers.

notes.description: Free-form notes about hardware assumptions or envelopes.

meta.description: Additional metadata such as author, creation time, or tags.

author.description: Primary author or owner of this topic.

tags.description: Free-form tags useful for search and filtering.
